## Project Name

**Title:** [Short descriptive title]
**Repository:** [Link to code repository]
**Tests:** [Number] passing
**Security Review:** [Summary]
**Status:** [Draft/Ready]

## Executive Summary
_A brief overview of what the project is, why it matters, and the requested funding amount._

## Applicant Information
- **Developer(s):**
- **GitHub:**
- **Contact:**

## Motivation
**1.1 Problem**: Description of the problem your project solves.
**1.2 Opportunity**: Why this is valuable to the Zcash ecosystem.

## Technical Approach
Outline of the solution, key components, and high-level architecture.

## Milestones and Deliverables
List of milestones, deliverables, acceptance criteria, and budget.

## Budget Breakdown
| Category | Amount | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|

## Risks and Mitigations
| Risk | Probability | Impact | Mitigation |

## Team Experience
Brief background on the developer(s) and relevant expertise.

## Success Metrics
How will success be measured quantitatively and qualitatively?

## Long-term Sustainability
Plans for maintenance and future enhancements.

## Additional References
Links to related work, ZIP specs, or prior grants.
